questionHtml: Outline how the diagram can be identified as a human brain and not the brain of a monkey.
markschemeHtml:
a. the cerebral hemispheres are larger «relative to rest of brain» ✔

b. the cerebral cortex forms a larger proportion of the brain ✔ 

c. there is extensive folding of the cerebral cortex ✔

meta.title: Outline how the diagram can be identified as a human brain and not the brain of a monkey.
